hero.title: Automate Your Business with AI
hero.subtitle: From ERP, CRM and marketing automation to business card scanning and document tracking — accelerate every process with AI.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: From quick automation tools to full-scale enterprise ERP/CRM solutions

kartvizit.title: Business Card Reader
kartvizit.description: Send a business card photo via Telegram. AI reads it and automatically saves to Google Contacts and Airtable.

belge_takip.title: Document Tracking
belge_takip.description: Drop files in your Google Drive folder. OCR reads the content, saves to Google Sheets, and moves the file to the processed folder.

erp.title: ERP System
erp.description: Full-scale Airtable-based ERP solution. Inventory, purchasing, sales, production and finance modules on one platform.

crm.title: CRM System
crm.description: Airtable-based customer relationship management. Lead tracking, sales pipeline, proposal and contract management.

pazarlama.title: Marketing Automation
pazarlama.description: Automate social media, email campaigns and content creation with AI. Full integration via n8n workflows.

how_it_works.title: How It Works?
how_it_works.subtitle: Start your AI automation in 3 simple steps

steps.title: Sign Up
steps.description: Create a free account with your email. Ready in minutes.

steps.title: Pay
steps.description: Choose the service that suits your needs and purchase with secure Stripe payment.

steps.title: Start Using
steps.description: Our setup team calls you, installs the system and provides training.

contact_cta.title: Have Questions?
contact_cta.subtitle: Reach us on WhatsApp and we'll respond quickly.

footer.description: Take your business to the future with AI and automation services.
